name: @aily-project/board-metro_m4_feat
description: The Adafruit Metro M4 Express featuring ATSAMD51J19 (ARM Cortex-M4 @ 120 MHz) with 2 MB QSPI Flash, NeoPixel, 2 DAC outputs, microSD slot, and full Arduino Uno R3 header layout.
description_en: The Adafruit Metro M4 Express featuring ATSAMD51J19 (ARM Cortex-M4 @ 120 MHz) with 2 MB QSPI Flash, NeoPixel, 2 DAC outputs, microSD slot, and full Arduino Uno R3 header layout.
description_zh_cn: Adafruit Metro M4 Express 搭载 ATSAMD51J19（ARM Cortex-M4 @ 120 MHz），配备 2 MB QSPI Flash、NeoPixel、2 个 DAC 输出、microSD 卡槽，兼容 Arduino Uno R3 排针布局。
author: Adafruit
